monitor.capture_what: file path passed to open for the password log file

oracle_check.condition_description: The captured file path contains 'password_reset_mailbox.log', confirming the code path that writes cleartext initial_password to the log file is reached.
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY_CLEAR_TEXT_STORAGE_SENSITIVE_DATA: cleartext password written to log file — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}

_meta.function_signature: def create_user(body: UserCreate, request: Request, db: Session, actor: User)
